Name: -1_art_say_enjoy_shows
Representative_Docs: ["When I say that someone has good taste, I generally mean that I can see value and positive qualities in the art/music/literature that they like, even if I don't enjoy it myself.  However I must admit that much of the time, when I say that someone has good taste, it means that they share my taste, i.e. they admire the art/music/literature that I myself enjoy. I have a friend who has excellent taste.  Her home is beautifully furnished, with many lovely pieces of furniture and decorative pieces that I admire.  Her clothes are really distinctive but not outlandish and I love the colors and styles she buys.  She is a musician and I always enjoy hearing the songs she plays on the piano for me.  She has recommended several books to me that I have really enjoyed.", 'Taste is about preference, therefore it is entirely subjective, even if the preference is based on objective qualities. I believe that nearly everyone believes they have "good taste," so when most people say "good taste," they mean that the taste in question is similar to their own.  Right now I can only think of my son. Of all the people I can recall, he is the only one with a taste similar to mine. Since I believe I have "good taste" I raised my son to enjoy the same types of movies and books that I enjoy. Of course, I didn\'t force it upon him, and at first, he found many of the movies boring, but gradually, over time he began to appreciate the type of art I enjoy.', "That their preference of music, art, clothing, movies, etc. is appealing, interesting, fun, exciting, likeable, good to look at or enjoy, or just appealing in every way. I'd have to pick one of my best friends because she wears beautiful fashionable clothes, has picked a gorgeous home & car, is successful, and just looks & acts classy & good most of the time. Her choices in many things is tasteful."]

Name: 0_music_food_say_having
Representative_Docs: ["When I say that someone has good taste, I usually refer to them liking the same thing as me.  Because we both enjoy the same thing, theres a connection. I think that my best friend has good taste in movies because we both enjoy the same kinds of movies. For example, we both love marvel movies so I'd say she has good taste.", "In these situations they are typically talking about things I have my own opinion on. I think of good taste to be someone who has a reasonable take on a given topic. A friend of mine who doesn't like listening to metal music but who understands the value in it. He also understands the difficulty in performing and how there is a type of music for everyone. This is an example where I would completely disagree with their opinion, but that doesn't necessarily mean they have bad taste. They also enjoy other forms of music that I also enjoy.", "Someone has a good taste in something when they're perceived to like something similar to myself. We see 'good taste' in a certain subject as something that we also enjoy. For example, I would say someone has a good taste in food if I perceive that they like similar foods to me. Having a good taste is subjective and aligns closely with my values. I would say my close friends/roommates have a good taste in much of my daily activities (entertainment, eating), since we have a lot of similarities in that regard. Our interests align, so I would define them as having a good taste."]

Name: 1_art_artistic_tends_works
Representative_Docs: ['It would be someone who enjoys things that make them think.  Things that also are lasting and not ephemeral that one enjoys are good taste to me.  Also I measure the time and effort one puts into something as showing they have good taste. Someone like Lord Kenneth Clark was a good example to me.  He loved art and wanted to show it to the masses.  At the same time he explained and did not try to bastardise the art that he spoke of.  He even enlightened me and made me want to learn more about art.', 'They appreciate art and culture that has enduring significance or meaning. They also appreciate artistic elements that share similar values as the culture at large. The person I am thinking of is a good judge of artistic merit, and her choices are designed to bring joy and enlightenment not just to herself, but to those around her.', 'Typically they have some education about the field of art and it has greatly impacted what they like and how much they value it. regardless of the field, it tends to allow them to value all artistic endeavors with a discerning eye or ear. My ex-wife has a English Degree and included art history and music appreciation in her studies. To a great degree we like the same things. She evaluates these things emotionally but her choices betray her underlaying knowledge.']

Name: 2_choices_look_pleasing_colors
Representative_Docs: ["They appreciate things like the writing style, colors and shades, and the way they work together. They don't often go for the gaudy or obvious but appreciate the subtleties of art.   Stacey has good taste. She enjoys novels that have interesting plots. Her home is decorated in a pleasing manner where colors and textures work well together. And the fact that she loves my poetry doesn't hurt.", "I think that they make good, stylish choices based on the type of aesthetic that I myself appreciate. They also think in creative ways that complement their choices as a whole. My best friend has very good taste, he really puts a lot of effort into making sure that things fit together in an appropriate way and cater to his strengths and weaknesses appropriately. He also does a lot of research online to see other people's tastes and tries to incorporate those things into his own stylistic choices.", "Their choices of what is appealing coincided with my own preferences. For instance, they chose colors that I didn't consider jarring or decor that wasn't overwhelming for the space or gaudy. My sister has good taste. She can walk into any room of any house and arrange the furniture and decor so that it is pleasing to the eye and feels appropriate. She has a natural ability to choose from the things available and arrange them so that if feels like they belong in the room naturally. She also can take one or two small objects or pieces of art and make the room feel balanced."]

Name: 3_clothes_look_dresses_dress
Representative_Docs: ['Generally, good taste reflects commonly understood descriptions that are pleasing or appropriate for the set of those  being asked.  It may have some parts that are not universally accepted, but in general all those asked will agree to some extent.   A friend  of mine always dresses in coordinated, niceley colored clothes that show off her figure to its best advantage.', "This is kind of subjective.  What some people think is good taste other people think is poor taste. To me, good taste is something that is classic. People of all ages will generally like it, though they might not know why. It is quiet and solid, not bold and attention seeking. It does not embarrass people to look at it. If it is furniture, it is comfortable and sturdy. If it is an action, it is polite and respective, no matter what was said or done to them. My preacher's wife has good taste. Her home is decorated with simple, solid furniture, and she has a china cupboard that has family china inside. She dresses simply, and she is happy and interested in everyone she meets.", 'To mean it means that the someone being referred to makes or usually for the most part things which are very good in terms of quality or appearance.  In reality though it effectively usually means that the person who is being referred to makes choices usually aligned with mine.  A person who has good taste may also be someone who consistently chooses things which are just generally popular overall. I think RR has good taste because she always dresses well with nicely coordinated accessories.  The clothes she picks  are very fits well and the colors patterns seem to blend well.  She never dresses slovenly or wears clothes whose colors and patterns clash.']
